verses.text: Topa in Moses kiangah
“Kha masa a ni masa ni-in nangmah in kikhopna buk ahi biakbuk na lam ding hi
Tua buk sungah thuciamna singkuang na koih ding a, dalna puan tawh singkuang na dal ding hi
Tua ciangin sabuai tumpihin a om ding bangin na koih ding hi. Meivakkhuam zong tumpihin a meivakte na bulh ding hi
Thuciamna singkuang mai-ah paknamtui halna dingin kham biakna tau na koih ding a, biakbuk kongkhak dingin kongpuankhai na khai ding hi
Kikhopna buk ahi biakbuk kongkhak mai-ah meihal biakna tau koihin
kikhopna buk leh biakna tau kikalah kisilna kuang na koih ding a, a sungah tui zong na koih ding hi
A kimkotah buktual na bawl ding a, buktual kongpi dingin kongpuankhai na khaito ding hi
“Tua ciangin sathau la-in, biakbuk leh a sunga om khempeuh na nuh ding a, biakbuk leh a innsungvan khempeuh na ap ding hi. Tua ciangin a siangtho biakna van a suak ding hi
Nangmah in meihal biakna tau leh a nazat khempeuh zong sathau nuhin biakna tau na ap ding a, tua biakna tau a siangtho pen hi ding hi
Kisilna kuang leh a ngakna zong sathau nuhin na ap ding hi
“Tua ciangin kikhopna buk kongkhakah Aaron leh ama tapate paipihin, tui tawh amaute na sil ding a
amah in keima tungah siampi na a sep theihna dingin puan siangthote Aaron silh sakin, amah sathau nilhin na ap ding hi
Tua ciangin ama tapate zong paipihin puantungsilhte na silhsak ding a

amaute in keima tungah siampi na a sep theihna dingun amaute' pa sathau na nilh bangin amaute zong sathau na nilh ding hi. Amau' sathau kinilhna in amau' khang tawntungin siampi hi paisuak sak ding hi,” a ci hi
Moses in zong Topa in amah a thupiaksa khempeuh tawh kituakin a hih hi
A kum nihna a kha masa, a ni masa ni-in biakbuk kilam hi
Moses in biakbuk lam hi. Amah in a bullente koihin, a khuampeekte phut a, a zawlte khumin, a khuampite a phut hi
Biakbuk tungah a tungkhuhna zal a, Topa in Moses a thupiaksa bangin puanbuk a tung a khuh hi
Topa in Moses a thupiaksa bangin amah in thuciamna suangpeek la-in singkuang sungah koih a, singkuang tungah a zawlte koihin, singkuang tung sanah hehpihna tokhom a nga hi
Biakbuk sungah singkuang paipihin, kongpuankhai dalna puan khai a, thuciamna singkuang a dal hi
Topa in Moses a thupiaksa bangin, amah in biakbuk leilu lam pang, dalna puan pualam, kikhopna buk sungah sabuai koih a
Topa' mai tua sabuai tungah a om ding bangin anlum a koih hi
Topa in Moses a thupiaksa bangin, amah in biakbuk leitaw lam pang, sabuai tawh a kigalsai-in, kikhopna buk sungah meivakkhuam koih a
Topa' mai-ah meivakte a koih hi
Topa in Moses a thupiaksa bangin, amah in kikhopna buk sung, dalna puan mai-ah kham biakna tau koih a
tua tungah a namtui paknamtui a hal hi
Amah in biakbuk kongkhak ding kongpuankhai a mun dingah a khai hi
Topa in Moses a thupiaksa bangin amah in kikhopna buk ahi biakbuk kongkhakah meihal biakna tau koih a, tua tungah meihal biakna leh an tawh biakna a pia hi
Kikhopna buk leh biakna tau kikalah kisilna kuang koih a, tua sungah kisilna ding tui zong a koih hi
Moses leh Aaron leh a tapate in amau' khut leh a khete uh tua tui tawh a sil uh hi
Topa in Moses a thupiaksa bangin, kikhopna bukah amaute a pai ciang leh biakna tau nai-ah a pai uh ciangin amaute kisil uh hi
Amah in biakbuk leh biakna tau kiimah a buktual bawl a, buktual kongpi kongpuankhai a khai hi. Tua ahih ciangin Moses in a nasep a man ta hi.
Tua ciangin meii in kikhopna buk tuam a, biakbuk sungah Topa' minthan'na vang a dim hi
Tua ahih manin kikhopna buk sungah Moses tum theilo hi
A khualzin sung tawntung uh biakbuk tung panin meii a kilakkhiat toh peuhpeuh ciangin Israel mite mailam nawtin pai uh a
ahih hangin meii a kilakkhiat kei leh a kilakkhiat ni mateng amaute paikhialo uh hi
Bang hang hiam cih leh a khualzin sung tawntung uh Israel mi khempeuh' muhna-ah biakbuk tungah sunin Topa' meii om a, zanin mei a om hi.
